name: Timeout
documentation:
Annotation to be placed on requests (i.e. queries and commands). Configures the time before such request will time out when sent using request/response methods such as {@code send} and {@code sendAndWait}.

If no timeout is configured here, blocking {@code sendAndWait} calls use their standard one-minute timeout while non-blocking {@code send} calls use the gateway's default request handling behavior.

methods.name: timeUnit
methods.documentation: Returns the time unit for {@link #value()}. Defaults to {@link TimeUnit#MILLISECONDS}.

methods.name: value
methods.documentation: Configures the maximum number of time units before a request with this annotation will time out.
